title: Trump started the Iran conflict, but still has options to keep oil and gas prices in check
author: Myra P. Saefong
fullText: Motorists are already on high alert for any changes to prices for gasoline at the pump as the U.S. conflict with Iran spreads beyond last weekend’s air strikes.
summary: Motorists are already on high alert for any changes to prices for gasoline at the pump as the U.S. conflict with Iran spreads beyond last weekend’s air strikes.
